title: Glow Into Dark
storyPurpose: Night: Spark runs away; hunters activate tracking.

panels.description: Night camp edge. Spark slips from wrap and bolts into forest; glow streak vanishing between trunks. Mira reaches too late.
Veiled Meridian hunters in veiled half-masks activate binding-compass devices; three-arc sigils light. Lead hunter Vex Halden cold; Nira Quill hesitant.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 12/25 — Glow Into Dark. Story purpose: Night: Spark runs away; hunters activate tracking. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p12a): Night camp edge. Spark slips from wrap and bolts into forest; glow streak vanishing between trunks. Mira reaches too late. Panel 2 (p12b): Veiled Meridian hunters in veiled half-masks activate binding-compass devices; three-arc sigils light. Lead hunter Vex Halden cold; Nira Quill hesitant. Characters: mira-eggwarden, vex-halden, nira-quill. Creatures: spark. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: night. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"spark":{"emotion":"flight","glow":"vanishing","position":"forest unknown"},"hunters":{"status":"tracking active","devices":"binding-compass on"},"time":"night"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
artAlt: Glow Into Dark — Spark's Journey page 12
transcript: SPEECH (Vex Halden): Trail lock. Alive capture only.
WHISPER (Nira Quill): If it's only a hatchling…
SPEECH (Vex Halden): Subject One is inventory. Move.
